game.inputPlayerNames: Enter names for 4 players (E, S, W, N)
game.selectLoserOrTsumo: Please select a loser or Tsumo.
game.confirmSaveScore: The score will be saved after confirmation.
game.penaltyDescription: Enter score adjustments for each player. Use positive numbers for adding, negative for deducting.
game.penaltyWarning: Current total is {{total}}. It should normally be 0, please check for omissions.
game.drawConfirm: Record a draw? All 4 players get 0 points.
game.deleteConfirm: Delete this game? This cannot be undone.
game.returnHomeConfirm: Return to home page? The current game will be saved automatically.
game.earlyEndGameDesc: Completed rounds are saved and can be viewed in history.
game.shareDetailFailed: Failed to share game details, please try again later.

stats.title: Statistics
stats.noStats: Statistics will be shown here after completing games.
stats.shareFailed: Failed to share, please try again later.

files.switchConfirm: The current archive has an unfinished game. Switch anyway?
files.createConfirm: Unfinished game exists. Create a new archive?
files.keepOne: Must keep at least one archive.
files.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? All games and stats inside will be lost.
files.dataFilesDesc: Saved separately for each circle, history and stats are isolated.
files.shareAndImportDesc: Share current archive with others, or import from others.
files.importDesc: Choose to merge or save as new after importing.
files.importMethodDesc: Merge for new records from the same circle; save as new to view separately.
files.mergeDesc: Suitable for new records from the same circle. Duplicates are skipped automatically.
files.saveAsNewDesc: Keep as a separate archive without affecting the current one.
files.switchFileDesc: History and stats will only show records from this archive.
files.importFailedMsg: Import failed. Please choose an archive shared or backed up by this app.
files.mergeNoNewGamesMsg:
No new games.

Skipped {{skipped}} duplicate games.
files.mergeFailedMsg: Merge failed, please try again later.
files.importNewFailedMsg: Failed to create new archive, please try again later.
files.backupFailedPermissionMsg: Backup failed, please check storage permissions.
files.shareText: This is a Mahjong score archive. You can choose to merge or save as new; duplicates are automatically skipped when merging.
files.shareNotSupportedMsg: Direct sharing is not supported by current browser, backup file downloaded.
files.shareFailedMsg: Failed to share archive, please try again later.

device.followPlayerDesc: Screen will automatically rotate to keep this player at the bottom

shareImage.singleMaxFanStats: Max {{fan}} Fan in a single hand!
shareImage.footerSponsor: Generated by MCR Scoreboard · Sponsored by Sichuan Panda MCR Club
shareImage.errorGenerateDetail: Failed to generate game detail image

help.v1_6_1_desc: No hardware scoreboard needed. Use an idle phone as display. Click 'Use as Display' on homepage.
help.v1_6_2_desc: The display automatically follows the player, keeping their score at the bottom without manual adjustment.
help.v1_6_3_desc: Bluetooth engine upgraded, supporting both host and peripheral roles.
help.v1_6_4_desc: Seamlessly switch between English, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese across the entire app, share images, and even the ESP32 hardware scoreboard!
help.v1_5_1_desc: One-click generation of beautiful game detail images, including rank cards and interesting marks for big wins.
help.v1_5_2_desc: Device ID is visible on power-up for easy pairing.
help.v1_4_1_desc: Added share button in stats page to generate comprehensive stats image.
help.v1_4_2_desc: Support creating independent archives for different groups.
help.v1_4_3_desc: Share current archive with others directly.
help.v1_4_4_desc: Auto-trim spaces in names to prevent duplicate stats for the same person.
help.v1_4_5_desc: Fixed Chinese character display issues on hardware scoreboards.
help.v1_3_1_desc: Fixed standard score calculation for more accurate historical stats.
help.v1_3_2_desc: Added stats for win count, fan distribution, max fan, etc.
help.v1_3_3_desc: Improved connection and display experience for hardware scoreboards.
help.v1_1_2_desc: Removed 'confirm score' step for smoother game pacing.
help.v1_1_3_desc: Supported proprietary BLE scoreboards for personalized experience.
help.v1_0_1_desc: All records and stats run locally, usable without internet.
help.v1_0_2_desc: Support archive sharing, import, and backup.
help.v0_6_1_desc: Auto-load previous game name and players on start.
help.v0_6_3_desc: History page shows game results and 24h summary.
help.start_3: Click 'Start Game' to create a 16-round match
help.stat_1: View stats of all completed games
help.author: Author: Li Rui

more.title: Settings
more.bleConnectDesc: Connect ESP32 hardware or phone peripherals
more.simulatedBoardDesc: Use this device as a scoreboard display
more.dataFilesDesc: Create, switch, share and import data files
